message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ユーザ" as user
participant "ブラウザ" as browser
participant "web.php" as web
participant "Kouka1_1Controller" as controller
participant "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" as index
participant "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" as layout
participant "components.menu.blade.php" as menu
participant "components.subview.blade.php" as subview

user -> browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka1_1]
browser -> web : GET[/kouka1_1]
web -> controller : @index
controller -> index
index -> layout : @extends
layout -> menu : @component
menu -> layout
layout -> subview : @include
subview -> layout

note right of user
ユーザ
end note

note right of browser
ブラウザ
end note

note right of web
web.php
end note

note right of controller
Kouka1_1Controller
end note

note right of index
Kouka1_1.index.blade.php
end note

note right of layout
layout.kouka1_1.blade.php
end note

note right of menu
components.menu.blade.php
end note

note right of subview
components.subview.blade.php
end note

@enduml
